description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.1 Docker image with a postgres service and caches the vendor/ directory. Define a variable POSTGRES_DB set to ruby-getting-started_test. Add a test job (default stage) that runs apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y nodejs, bundle install --path vendor, bundle exec rake db:create RAILS_ENV=test, and bundle exec rake test.
